---
title: "Software Setup"
toc: true
toc-location: right
---

**What you need to do:**

- Install six core tools: Stata, R, Python, Positron, Quarto, Git
- Install the `uv` Python package manager

---

## Required Software

The table below lists the software needed and the minimum recommended version.

| Software | Version | Notes |
|----------|---------|-------|
| Stata | 19 or higher | MP edition preferred |
| Positron | latest | User-level install |
| Quarto | 1.9+ | Admin-level install (all users) |
| R | 4.5.2+ | Regular install |
| Python | 3.13+ | Regular install |
| Git | 2.52+ | Regular install |

### World Bank Laptops

All software above is available through the **Software Center**.

![Software Center](https://worldbank.github.io/geoPovLearn/seminars/seminar-2026-02/images/software-center.png)

If something is missing, submit a [Software Installation Request](https://worldbankgroup.service-now.com/wbg/en/software-installation-request?id=wbg_sc_catalog&sys_id=bd1e71b86f16d340db112d232e3ee4b7&table=sc_cat_item&searchTerm=Software%20installation) or contact [ITHelp@worldbankgroup.org](mailto:ITHelp@worldbankgroup.org).

::: callout-note
If you have an older version of Positron, reinstall it — the Software Center version supports auto-updating.
:::

### Private Laptops

- **R**: <https://cran.r-project.org/>
- **Python**: <https://www.python.org/downloads/>
- **Positron**: <https://positron.posit.co/download.html>
- **Quarto**: <https://quarto.org/docs/get-started/>
- **Git**: <https://git-scm.com/download/win>

---

## UV: Python Package Manager

`uv` is required for Python environment management.

1. Open Command Prompt or PowerShell (`Win + R` → type `cmd` or `powershell`)
2. Run: `pip install uv`
3. Verify: `uv --version` — you should see output like `uv 0.9.18 ...`

For Positron extensions setup (including the **Stata MCP** extension), see [Positron Extensions](extensions.qmd).
